prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-BGTSK-BUN-6PC-STD-ASSRTD-BNDL Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Ceramic Gold Testing Pot with Testing Stone and 4 Vials Description: This gold testing kit is a great way to get started making your fortune in precious metals.

With the price of gold skyrocketing, now is the time to find all the gold you can. This set includes a ceramic pot for melting your gold, a stone to scratch-test your gold, and 4 vials to store your gold flakes or jewelry.

Not only is this set good for gold testing, some of these items have a variety of uses. The ceramic pot is perfect for melting copper as well as gold, and the vials can store many different small items. Search Terms: prospecting gold panning tester hiking backpacking Features: - Ceramic Pot: 3" x 1.25" (dia x H) - Ceramic Pot: 3" x 1.25" (dia x H) | Testing Stone: 2" x 1.5" (L x W) - Large Vial: 6.4 cm x 1.75 cm (H x dia) - Small Vial: 3.8 cm x 1.5 cm (H x dia) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Gold Testing Kit with Ceramic Pot and Vials
